inputs.label: 1RM (One Rep Max)
inputs.businessContext: The maximum weight you can lift for one repetition.

businessContext_i18n.en: The maximum weight you can lift for one repetition.

inputs.label: 5RM % of 1RM
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of your 1RM that represents your 5-rep max. Typically 85%.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of your 1RM that represents your 5-rep max. Typically 85%.
businessContext_i18n.tr: 5 tekrar maksimumunuzu temsil eden 1TM'nizin yüzdesi. Tipik olarak %85.

inputs.label: Volume Day % of 5RM
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of your 5RM used for the volume day (5 sets of 5 reps).

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of your 5RM used for the volume day (5 sets of 5 reps).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Hacim günü (5 set 5 tekrar) için kullanılan 5TM'nizin yüzdesi.

inputs.label: Light Day % of Volume
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of the volume day weight used for the light day (2 sets of 5 reps).

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of the volume day weight used for the light day (2 sets of 5 reps).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Hafif gün (2 set 5 tekrar) için kullanılan hacim günü ağırlığının yüzdesi.

inputs.label: Intensity Day Increment
inputs.businessContext: Weight added to the previous week's intensity day weight for a new 5RM attempt. Set to 0 if not incrementing.

businessContext_i18n.en: Weight added to the previous week's intensity day weight for a new 5RM attempt. Set to 0 if not incrementing.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yeni bir 5TM denemesi için önceki haftanın yoğunluk günü ağırlığına eklenen ağırlık. Artırım yapılmıyorsa 0 olarak ayarlayın.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
